data.title: Prosper Gold Secures $525,000 for Cyprus Project Exploration
data.description:
Prosper Gold ( (TSE:PGX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Prosper Gold Corp. has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement, raising $525,000 through the issuance of 5,250,000 flow-through shares. The proceeds from this financing will be directed towards exploration activities at the company’s Cyprus Project, enhancing its operational capabilities and potentially strengthening its position in the mining sector.

More about Prosper Gold

Prosper Gold Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on exploration activities. The company is engaged in the development of mineral projects, with a particular emphasis on its Cyprus Project.

data.title: L1 Long Short Fund Ltd. Announces Director’s Share Acquisition
data.description:
L1 Long Short Fund Ltd. ( (AU:LSF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

L1 Long Short Fund Ltd. has announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Raphael Lamm. The change includes the acquisition of 44,400 ordinary shares through an on-market trade, valued at $125,234.64. This adjustment in shareholding reflects the director’s ongoing involvement and investment in the company, potentially impacting the company’s market perception and investor confidence.

More about L1 Long Short Fund Ltd.

L1 Long Short Fund Ltd. operates in the financial industry, focusing on investment management. The company primarily engages in long and short equity strategies, aiming to deliver superior risk-adjusted returns for its stakeholders.

data.title: Bain Capital Entities Cease Substantial Holding in Tower Limited
data.description:
Tower Limited ( (AU:TWR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bain Capital Credit LP, Bain Capital Investments (Europe) Limited, and Dent Issuer Designated Activity Company have ceased to hold a substantial interest in Tower Limited, a company listed on the NZX. Previously holding 19.941% of Tower Limited’s ordinary shares, these entities now hold 0% following a block trade agreement executed on March 31, 2025, with Forsyth Barr Limited and Goldman Sachs New Zealand Limited. This transaction involved the sale of 68,306,802 shares at a fixed price of NZ$1.30 per share, totaling NZ$88,798,842.60, with settlement completed on April 3, 2025.

More about Tower Limited

data.title: Elife Holdings Announces Extraordinary General Meeting for Share Issuance Authorization
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Elife Holdings Limited ( (HK:0223) ).

Elife Holdings Limited has announced an extraordinary general meeting (EGM) to be held on April 25, 2025, in Hong Kong. The meeting will address ordinary resolutions, including authorizing the company’s directors to allot, issue, and manage additional shares, subject to certain conditions. This move could potentially impact the company’s capital structure by allowing for a share issuance of up to 20% of the current total shares, excluding treasury shares, which may influence the company’s market positioning and shareholder value.

More about Elife Holdings Limited

data.title: Sweet Poison Spirits Inc. Rebrands to Hyper Bit Technologies Ltd.
data.description:
Hemp for Health Inc ( (TSE:SPS) ) has shared an announcement.

Sweet Poison Spirits Inc., a company previously known for its involvement in the spirits industry, has officially changed its name to Hyper Bit Technologies Ltd. This rebranding marks a significant shift in the company’s focus and market positioning. The company’s shares will begin trading under the new name and symbol ‘HYPE’ on the Canadian Securities Exchange starting April 8, 2025. The name change does not affect the company’s share capital, and shareholders are not required to take any action regarding their share certificates. This strategic move may indicate a new direction for the company, potentially impacting its operations and stakeholder interests.

More about Hemp for Health Inc

data.title: Telix Pharmaceuticals to Release Shares from Voluntary Escrow
data.description:
An update from Telix Pharmaceuticals Ltd. ( (AU:TLX) ) is now available.

Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited announced the release of 237,669 ordinary shares from voluntary escrow, which were initially issued to the vendors of ARTMS Inc. as part of its acquisition. This release, scheduled for April 11, 2025, marks a significant step in integrating ARTMS into Telix’s operations, potentially enhancing its market positioning and offering new opportunities for stakeholders.

More about Telix Pharmaceuticals Ltd.

Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited is a biopharmaceutical company specializing in the development and commercialization of therapeutic and diagnostic radiopharmaceuticals and associated medical technologies. Headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, Telix operates internationally in the United States, Brazil, Canada, Europe, and Japan. The company focuses on addressing significant unmet medical needs in oncology and rare diseases through its portfolio of clinical and commercial stage products.

data.title: Lemon Tree Hotels Expands with New Jaipur Property
data.description:
Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd. ( (IN:LEMONTREE) ) has shared an update.

Lemon Tree Hotels Limited has announced the signing of a new property, Lemon Tree Hotel, in Jaipur, Rajasthan, which will be managed by its subsidiary, Carnation Hotels Private Limited. The hotel, expected to open in FY 2027, will feature 66 rooms and various amenities, enhancing the company’s presence in Rajasthan, where it already has 10 hotels and six upcoming properties. This expansion is part of Lemon Tree’s strategy to strengthen its market position and cater to the growing demand in the hospitality sector, offering easy access to Jaipur’s cultural and historical attractions.

More about Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd.

Lemon Tree Hotels Limited is one of India’s largest hotel chains, operating across upscale, upper-midscale, midscale, and economy segments. The company offers seven brands, including Aurika Hotels & Resorts and Lemon Tree Premier, and has a portfolio of over 210 hotels, with more than 110 operational and 100 set to open in India and internationally. Lemon Tree Hotels are located in major metros and various tier I, II, and III cities, as well as internationally in Dubai, Bhutan, and Nepal.

YTD Price Performance: -13.93%

Average Trading Volume: 201,700

Current Market Cap: 101.8B INR

data.title: Neuren Pharmaceuticals Announces Cessation of Securities via Buy-Back
data.description:
Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited ( (AU:NEU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced the cessation of 1,269,250 ordinary fully paid securities due to an on-market buy-back, effective March 31, 2025. This move is part of the company’s capital management strategy and may impact its stock liquidity and shareholder value, reflecting its ongoing efforts to optimize financial performance and shareholder returns.

More about Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited

Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited operates in the pharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development of therapies for neurological disorders. The company is known for its innovative approaches to treating conditions such as Rett syndrome and Fragile X syndrome, aiming to address unmet medical needs in these areas.
